case_title: FARID DZIRI VS. JOHN JIVAN LAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF FARID DZIRI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JOHN JIVAN LAL AND DOREEN ANNAMMA RAJU LAL ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM TO HAVE THE MATTER HEARD TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DZIRI, FARID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAL, JOHN JIVAN RAJU LAL, DOREEN ANNAMMA $9,227.27 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,302.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
